name.en-US: ERS-Display-Lite Elsys LoRaWAN Lite Display Room Sensor
name.pt-BR: ERS-Display-Lite Sensor de Ambiente Lite com Display LoRaWAN Elsys

description.en-US: Elsys ERS-Display-Lite — LoRaWAN (Class A) indoor sensor that monitors temperature, humidity and light. Uplinks are Elsys TLV frames on FPort 5.
description.pt-BR: Elsys ERS-Display-Lite — sensor LoRaWAN (Classe A) de ambiente interno que monitora temperatura, umidade e luz. Os uplinks são quadros TLV Elsys no FPort 5.
